data.name: Love Lust and a Little Evil
data.detailed_description:
A dead-end job just became a gateway to hell... and the best sex of your life.

Your life is a grind. A brutal boss, a thankless job, and a future that looks as deep as the trenches you dig. But that all changes when you unearth an ancient, magical box. A single drop of blood is all it takes to break the seal and unleash Calysindra, a succubus imprisoned for centuries.

She offers you a simple, dangerous bargain: a lifetime of supernatural pleasure in exchange for your very essence. This is your story. Resist her seduction and seek a way to break her hold, or embrace the corruption and discover a power of your own. The choice is yours, and every decision leads to intense, explicit encounters.

Key Features

  • 🔥 A Demonic Pact
    Engage in a relationship with Calysindra, a powerful and captivating succubus. Your choices determine the dynamic—from willing servant to dominant master.

  • 💋 Unapologetically Explicit Content
    Engage in vividly illustrated scenes that explore a wide range of adult fantasies. The chemistry is intense and the action leaves nothing to the imagination.

  • 🎭 Choices with Consequence
    Shape your path through meaningful decisions that unlock different story branches and multiple endings.

  • 😈 Power and Revenge
    Discover a hidden legacy within your own blood. Use your newfound influence to turn the tables on everyone who ever looked down on you.

  • 🌟 A World of Desire

    Discover a story where supernatural lust and personal ambition collide. Turn the tables on your tormentors and explore a relationship that blurs the line between pleasure and peril. Your path can lead to submissive ecstasy or dominant control.

Love, Lust, and a Little Evil is a mature visual novel for players who enjoy supernatural erotica, power fantasies, and taking control of their own destiny.

This is your chance to escape the ordinary. Open the box.

data.short_description: Your dead-end job unleashes a seductive succubus. A lifetime of supernatural pleasure is yours—in exchange for your soul. Embrace the corruption or fight for control in this explicit adult visual novel.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
